tools.name: score_cv
tools.description: Score how well a CV/resume matches a specific job posting. Fast and cheap — returns the original match score and the score after tailoring, plus requirement counts. Use this first to show the user the gap before a full tailor.

tools.name: tailor_cv
tools.description: Tailor a CV/resume to a specific job posting: rewrites the CV with the posting's ATS keywords (never fabricating skills not already present), and returns the tailored CV, a match score, role-fit notes and interview prep. Trial is rate-limited per IP; for unlimited use the user should sign up at maxc
